name: Chicken Veronique
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons White wine OR lemon juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tablespoons butter in a 10-inch skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add mushrooms and sauté for 2 minutes. Turn the mushrooms onto a heated platter.
3. Add remaining butter to the skillet.
4. Place chicken into the pan and sauté over medium heat for about 10 minutes, turning occasionally until cooked through.
5. After 5 minutes of cooking, add onions and white wine or lemon juice.
6. Arrange cooked chicken on top of the mushrooms.
7. Drizzle mushroom juices into the skillet and bring to a boil.
8. Add cream and continue boiling for 2-3 minutes.
9. Stir in salt and pepper.
10. Pour the sauce and grapes over the chicken.
11. Serve immediately. If the dish has cooled, return it to the pan for a few minutes to reheat before serving.
12. Can be made ahead of time and refrigerated. Before serving, either return to the pan and reheat over low heat or microwave covered on medium power for 1 minute.
